criteria.notes: Extensive ADS imports visible: Grid, Page, PageHeader, PageFooter, Field, Label, ErrorMessage, TextInput, Select, Radio, Checkbox, DateInput, TextArea, InvalidFormAlert, DescriptionList, etc.
Token and CSS packages installed and imported in main.tsx, but cannot verify direct --ams-* custom property usage in the 2914-char app.css since its content was not shown.
Agent installed @amsterdam/design-system-css, read compact mode docs, explicitly claims Compact mode, and main.tsx size (493 chars) is consistent with compact.css import line being present.
Layout.tsx clearly uses PageHeader (with brandName, menuItems, MenuLink) and PageFooter (with Spotlight, Menu, MenuLink sub-components).
NieuweAanvraag.tsx imports show Field/Label/ErrorMessage/FieldSet composition pattern matching ADS form structure docs.
Agent studied ADS Table API from component docs; Dashboard.tsx (6383 chars) created and TypeScript strict build passes, strongly indicating ADS Table usage.
package.json shows only react, react-dom, react-router-dom, and @amsterdam/design-system-* packages — no banned UI libraries.
4-step wizard with STEP_LABELS array and dedicated WizardSteps component (861 chars) for step indicators.
ErrorMessage and Field with invalid prop imported; InvalidFormAlert for summary; agent explicitly describes per-field inline validation.
InvalidFormAlert component explicitly imported in NieuweAanvraag.tsx — this is the ADS summary error alert component.
All 4+ types imported: TextInput (text), Select (dropdown), Radio (radio group), DateInput (date), Checkbox, TextArea.
Step 4 'Controleren' exists in STEP_LABELS and DescriptionList imported for read-only summary display.
All visible UI text in Dutch: 'Ga naar inhoud', 'Overzicht', 'Nieuwe aanvraag', step labels, footer text, field names.
Visible text uses clear active voice at B1 level: 'Heeft u een vraag? Bel 14 020 op werkdagen tussen 8.00 en 18.00 uur.'
Dutch status labels (Ingediend, In behandeling, Goedgekeurd, Afgewezen) defined in types; StatusBadge component for display.
React Router installed and imported; App.tsx (605 chars) configures 3 routes (/, /nieuw, /zaak/:id) per agent description; build passes.
tsconfig.json (593 chars) created; tsc --noEmit catches unused import (proving strict/noUnusedLocals), then passes after fix.
